name: threejs-game-skills
description: Self-contained skills for building playable, polished Three.js browser games.

interface.shortDescription: Skills for building playable, polished Three.js browser games.
interface.longDescription: A suite of self-contained skills for building complete Three.js browser games. Includes threejs-game-director (orchestration), threejs-gameplay-systems (mechanics), threejs-aaa-graphics-builder (visuals), threejs-game-ui-designer (HUD/menus), threejs-debug-profiler, threejs-qa-release, threejs-3d-generator, threejs-image-generator, and threejs-audio-generator.
defaultPrompt: Use threejs-game-director to build a premium game from scratch
Use threejs-game-director to upgrade this game's visuals
Use threejs-game-director to debug and finish this game
